rules: Color is Function Only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome.
Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Tint neutrals with a tiny bit of blue (cool grey) to make them feel alive.
Interactive states must have explicit high contrast.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-black
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

rules: Use Generous Spacing for the hero upload zone (p-12 or p-24).
Dashboard/Results area should use tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) for high data density.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Expose the skeleton. Use pure HTML + Tailwind CSS for structural grid borders.
Dashboard Cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow.
Upload Zone: Use 'The Tracing Beam' concept for the drag-and-drop area—a glowing or dashed border that signals activity.
No glassmorphism for this forensic tool; maintain solid, stark backgrounds to prevent data refraction.

components.strategy: Shadcn/UI heavily customized to remove Vercel-look

specifics.upload_zone: Massive target area with dashed borders. Custom Framer Motion drag events. Use 'data_bg' image at low opacity inside the dropzone.
specifics.metadata_table: Dense, monospace font for keys and values. Border-collapse table layout.
specifics.tabs: Shadcn Tabs for EXIF / Document / Media / Location. Sharp edges, high contrast active state (Black bg, White text).
specifics.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). Hover state must be lighter hue or inverted.
specifics.map_view: Leaflet.js integration for GPS coordinates. Monochrome map tiles if possible.
specifics.progress_bar: Shadcn Progress, colored International Klein Blue.

rules: Minimalist animations. Use micro-interactions for feedback (e.g., file drop accepted).
Staggered entrance for metadata list items.
Scanning animation over the document icon during hash calculation.

images.description: Abstract network data background to be used as a subtle overlay inside the Drag-and-Drop hero section (opacity-10).
Privacy and local processing illustration, to be placed in the 'About/How it works' section.

Main_Page.Header: Fixed header with 'META ANALYTICS' logo, '100% Local Processing' badge, and GitHub/Docs links.
Main_Page.Hero: Full width. Massive drag-and-drop zone. Support text 'Arraste um arquivo ou clique para selecionar (Até 200GB)'.
Main_Page.Processing_State: Replaces upload zone when active. Shows live progress bar and calculating hashes animation.

Results_Dashboard.Hashes_Panel: Shows MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 with copy buttons. Uses IBM Plex Mono.
Results_Dashboard.Metadata_Tabs: Tabs to switch between categories. Uses dense table layout for Key/Value pairs.
Results_Dashboard.Location_Panel: Map view pinpointing GPS data if present in EXIF.
Results_Dashboard.Actions: Download PDF Report and Download JSON buttons at the top right of the dashboard.

Main_Page.About_Section: Grid bento layout highlighting 'Zero Data Collection', 'Local in Browser', 'All File Types'. Uses privacy illustration.
Main_Page.Footer: Minimal technical footer. Dark mode contrast (Dark background, light text) or simple subtle bottom footer.

rules: All text must meet APCA contrast standards. Minimum 4.5:1 for standard text.
Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid (e.g., data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='download-pdf-btn').
Use aria-hidden for purely decorative icons.
